summary_en: KINDEN Corporation to acquire Kodensha Corporation via tender offer at ¥11,501/share. Minimum 1,336,800 shares (66.67% ownership post-acquisition at minimum threshold). Tender period May 26 - July 6, 2026 (30 business days). Purpose: complete subsidiary. Mitsubishi Electric (51.36% holder) has agreed not to tender and to participate in squeeze-out procedures post-closing.
title_en: Notice Regarding Commencement of Tender Offer for Ordinary Shares of Kodensha Corporation (Securities Code: 1948)
translation_en_brief: KINDEN Corporation announced on May 25, 2026, the launch of a tender offer to acquire all ordinary shares of Kodensha Corporation (TSE Standard Market, code 1948), with the objective of making Kodensha a wholly owned subsidiary. The offer price is ¥11,501 per share, with a minimum purchase threshold of 1,336,800 shares (representing 66.67% ownership on a fully-diluted basis using the baseline share count of 8,733,600). The tender period runs from May 26 to July 6, 2026 (30 business days). Mitsubishi Electric, which currently holds 51.36% (4,485,620 shares) as Kodensha's parent company, has agreed not to tender and has executed a transaction agreement with KINDEN to participate in post-closing squeeze-out procedures and subsequent treasury stock acquisition to complete the transition to 100% ownership. Kodensha's board has recommended the offer to shareholders.
